overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through a futuristic neon-lit city. The player moves along sidewalks past pedestrians and vehicles, transitioning between covered streets and open intersections with large digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered urban sidewalk beneath elevated highway structures

events.description: futuristic black sedan with red neon underglow passes by on the right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the covered sidewalk beneath the elevated highway, observing the cyberpunk cityscape

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking ahead on the sidewalk
futuristic sedan with glowing red accents driving past on the street

entered.detail: massive concrete and steel overpass structure spanning the street above
tall brutalist concrete building facade with minimal windows
futuristic glass skyscraper with reflective surfaces visible in the distance
horizontal red neon light strips along the roadside barrier

segments.scene_description: Walking along a covered urban sidewalk beneath massive elevated highway structures. The concrete building wall runs along the left while futuristic vehicles with neon underglow pass by on the right. The atmosphere is distinctly cyberpunk with mixed natural and artificial lighting filtering through the overpass.

scene_state.functional_zone: open pedestrian walkway with large digital advertisements

events.description: ground surface changes from concrete to orange-brown tiles, scene opens to reveal large digital billboard
pedestrian in blue dress walks past camera from right to left

agents.ego_description: continuing forward as the environment opens up, passing other pedestrians on the tiled walkway

notable_agents.action: woman in blue dress walking past the camera from right to left
pedestrian in dark suit walking toward the camera

entered.detail: massive digital screen displaying advertisements with purple and white graphics
distinctive orange-brown geometric patterned pavement tiles

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a more open area with distinctive orange tiled pavement. A massive digital billboard dominates the right side of the view while pedestrians walk in opposing directions. The elevated highway structure remains visible ahead but the space feels less enclosed than the previous section.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway beneath elevated transit line with neon advertisements

events.description: enters covered area beneath yellow structural beams, large holographic billboard becomes visible on the left
red sports car with glowing accents drives past on the right

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass with yellow structural elements, passing illuminated advertisements and storefronts

notable_agents.action: red sports car with glowing neon accents driving along the street
pedestrian sitting on a bench near the yellow building entrance

entered.detail: large illuminated billboard with 'WET DREAM' text and graphic imagery
yellow-painted steel support beams of the elevated highway structure
building entrance with distinctive yellow and black color scheme
green-lit digital information display with map interface

segments.scene_description: Walking beneath the elevated highway supported by distinctive yellow structural beams. The 'WET DREAM' billboard dominates the left side while the ground returns to concrete. The area is more artificially lit with green neon accents from a street information kiosk and passing vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy urban intersection with crosswalks and multiple digital billboards

events.description: approaches crosswalk and begins crossing the street
black van drives through the intersection ahead

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at the intersection, navigating through pedestrians and observing the traffic

notable_agents.action: black van driving through the intersection ahead
pedestrian in dark clothing crossing the street from left to right

entered.detail: yellow striped pedestrian crossing markings on the asphalt
massive tower structure covered in multiple digital screens and holographic displays
dense cluster of illuminated advertisements and corporate signage

segments.scene_description: Approaching and crossing a busy urban intersection with yellow crosswalk markings. The scene opens up to reveal a massive digital billboard tower ahead covered in holographic advertisements. Multiple pedestrians cross in various directions while vehicles including a black van navigate the intersection. The atmosphere is bustling with cyberpunk urban energy.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a dense cyberpunk district, moving from the claustrophobic shadows of an overpass into a wide, neon-drenched urban intersection. It begins along a covered sidewalk beneath massive elevated highway structures, where concrete walls flank the left and vehicles with neon underglow glide past on the right. As the camera moves forward, the space opens up onto orange tiled pavement dominated by a massive digital billboard and a flow of pedestrians. The scene then shifts back beneath the highway's yellow structural beams, passing a prominent Wet Dream billboard and green neon kiosks before the ground returns to gray concrete. Finally, the view expands completely as the camera crosses a busy intersection with yellow markings, revealing a towering holographic advertisement amidst a bustling crowd of pedestrians and vehicles.
